items.title: Israel releases all but two activists in Greece after intercepting Gaza aid flotilla
items.dek: The Global Sumud Flotilla denounced the interception as "piracy", while Israel's foreign ministry called the flotilla a "PR stunt".
items.body: The Global Sumud Flotilla denounced the interception as "piracy", while Israel's foreign ministry called the flotilla a "PR stunt".
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US imposes sanctions on DR Congo ex-President Kabila alleging rebel support
items.dek: The former leader has not responded to US accusations that he is aiming to destabilise the government.
items.body: The former leader has not responded to US accusations that he is aiming to destabilise the government.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Vonn still in 'survival mode' after Olympic crash
items.dek: American skiing great Lindsey Vonn says she is still "too emotional" to make a decision on her future career as she faces at least 18 months of recuperation.
items.body: American skiing great Lindsey Vonn says she is still "too emotional" to make a decision on her future career as she faces at least 18 months of recuperation.
items.author: IriLine Desk
